rankings.reason: Perfectly captures the 2050 futuristic vision with seamless, high-tech automation and a stress-free, personalized traveler experience.
Focuses on practical, high-value service integration that solves real traveler pain points during the arrival process.
Offers solid operational improvements but lacks the truly innovative, futuristic flair requested for a 2050 design.
Too generic; it describes a standard modern airport lounge experience rather than a futuristic, high-tech vision.
